# Testing BIN Lookup
The TokenEx Sandbox is designed to validate your API integration and workflow logic by returning attributes for a curated subset of BIN ranges. While this test data is simulated for functionality—meaning it is not a measure of real-world accuracy—it allows you to confirm how your system handles and makes inferences from the returned info. In the Production environment, TokenEx acts as a direct pass-through service for the card brands, ensuring you receive the most accurate data available.
note
You can only test using card numbers that fall within the specific ranges listed in the table below. Results will populate with Ixopay generated bank names.  
| Range Start (Min)  | Range End (Max)  | Test Card Example  |  
| --- | --- | --- |  
| 2204560000000000000  | 2204569999999999999  | 2204565829304410  |  
| 2347860000000000000  | 2347869999999999999  | 2347864190883250  |
